message:
feat(og): add static OG share image for /web live demo page

The /web route is served as static HTML (not App Router), so OG images
must be static PNGs. Generated a 1200x630 image matching the site's
existing OG style — Frankenstein head with green glow, "Live Demo"
title, WASM_KERNEL_LIVE status badge.

Also excludes og.png and version.json from rsync --delete so they
survive re-syncs from the source dist.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -47,7 +47,7 @@ done
 mkdir -p "$DEST"
 
 # Build rsync args
-RSYNC_ARGS=(-av --delete)
+RSYNC_ARGS=(-av --delete --exclude='og.png' --exclude='version.json')
 if $DRY_RUN; then
   RSYNC_ARGS+=(--dry-run)
   echo "=== DRY RUN ==="
